title: Revenge of the Teenage Dead
description: His name is Biff Harris. The story he’s about to tell you is true. If it wasn’t, he wouldn’t be dead.
quote: The teenage zombies could not control their bloodlust. Every parent was on the menu.
altHero: dead teen boy in a tux sitting up inside a coffin in a dark, candle-lit room
alt1: man wearing a hockey mask and holding a chainsaw climbs up the stairs
alt2: Douglas Howser as Pete, a scared boy
alt3: Wanda Plenn as Mary Sue, screaming into Pete’s face
